payload.answer: Approve supersession: the new memory indicates Sam left Goldman and joined Point72, so the current employment should be updated to Point72 and the Goldman job should be treated as previous employment.
citations: Existing memory: Sam works at Goldman.
New: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

entity_resolution.reason: The person entity Sam appears to be the same across both statements; the job change is a supersession of employment status rather than a new entity.

payload.intent: Resolve a job-status conflict where new information supersedes an existing employment memory.

memory_cards.statement: Sam no longer works at Goldman.

details: Conflict identified as a job-status supersession.
Goldman retained only as prior employer.

raw_text: {"intent":"Resolve a job-status conflict where new information supersedes an existing employment memory.","decision":"approve_supersession","memory_cards":[{"kind":"fact","statement":"Sam currently works at Point72.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Point72","type":"organization","role":"employer"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"works_at","object":"Point72"}]},{"kind":"fact","statement":"Sam no longer works at Goldman.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"former employer"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"left","object":"Goldman"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"keep_both","entity_id":null,"reason":"The person entity Sam appears to be the same across both statements; the job change is a supersession of employment status rather than a new entity."},"conflict_classification":"supersession","answer":"Approve supersession: the new memory indicates Sam left Goldman and joined Point72, so the current employment should be updated to Point72 and the Goldman job should be treated as previous employment.","citations":["Existing memory: Sam works at Goldman.","New: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72."],"repair_options":["approve_supersession","keep_both","reject_new","edit"],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Conflict identified as a job-status supersession.","Current employment updated to Point72.","Goldman retained only as prior employer."]}}
